heading: American Television and Radio Archives
label: 170 American Television and Radio Archives
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note preceding , Copyrights.Jan. 1, 1978section 102 of Pub. L. 94–553section 101 of Title 17

children.heading: Establishment and maintenance in Library of Congress; purpose; determination of composition, cataloging, indexing and availability by Librarian
children.label: a Establishment and maintenance in Library of Congress; purpose; determination of composition, cataloging, indexing and availability by Librarian
A
children.text: acquired in accordance with sections 407 and 408 of title 17; and

children.label: B
children.text: transferred from the existing collections of the Library of Congress; and

children.label: C
children.text: given to or exchanged with the Archives by other libraries, archives, organizations, and individuals; and

The Librarian shall maintain and publish appropriate catalogs and indexes of the collections of the Archives, and shall make such collections available for study and research under the conditions prescribed under this section.

children.heading: Reproduction, compilation, and distribution for research of regularly scheduled newscasts or on-the-spot coverage of news events by Librarian; promulgation of regulations
children.label: b Reproduction, compilation, and distribution for research of regularly scheduled newscasts or on-the-spot coverage of news events by Librarian; promulgation of regulations

children.text: to reproduce a fixation of such a program, in the same or another tangible form, for the purposes of preservation or security or for distribution under the conditions of clause (3) of this subsection; and
to compile, without abridgment or any other editing, portions of such fixations according to subject matter, and to reproduce such compilations for the purpose of clause (1) of this subsection; and

children.label: A
children.text: by loan to a person engaged in research; and

children.label: B
children.text: for deposit in a library or archives which meets the requirements of ,section 108(a) of title 17

children.heading: Liability for copyright infringement by Librarian or any employee of Librarian
children.label: c Liability for copyright infringement by Librarian or any employee of Librarian
children.text: The Librarian or any employee of the Library who is acting under the authority of this section shall not be liable in any action for copyright infringement committed by any other person unless the Librarian or such employee knowingly participated in the act of infringement committed by such person. Nothing in this section shall be construed to excuse or limit liability under title 17 for any act not authorized by that title or this section, or for any act performed by a person not authorized to act under that title or this section.

children.heading: Short title
children.label: d Short title
children.text: This section may be cited as the “American Television and Radio Archives Act”.
